title: Qatar Says It Shot Down Two Iranian Bombers
summary_full: It was the first report in this conflict of Iran attempting to attack its Persian Gulf neighbors with warplanes. The incident indicates a sharp escalation in tensions between Iran and Qatar.
summary_public: It was the first report in this conflict of Iran attempting to attack its Persian Gulf neighbors with warplanes. The incident indicates a sharp escalation in tensions between Iran and Qatar.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Qatar Says It Shot Down Two Iranian Bombers
